scene.scenePrompt: Wide establishing shot of a cramped, cluttered shared apartment interior at deep night. The room is lit by the cold, harsh glow of a laptop screen and a phone on a low table, both displaying dense, overwhelming text and notification icons. Discarded takeout boxes, crumpled papers, and a half-empty mug litter the space. In the foreground, a closed door is slightly ajar, hinting at a hasty exit. Through the window, a distant, poorly-lit parking lot is visible, with a single battered sedan parked under a flickering streetlamp. The atmosphere is one of suffocating pressure and quiet despair, rendered in muted, desaturated tones with deep shadows.

beats.narration: The glare of your phone screen makes your eyes ache. The latest message is a rent demand from your landlord; the one before that is a termination notice from HR. Your flatmate's door is shut tight, and the living room is piled high with takeout boxes. You feel like a squeezed lemon—sour, drained, with nothing left but a wrinkled rind.
You stand up abruptly, banging your knee against the coffee table and grimacing in pain. A surge of nameless fury rushes straight to your head.
beats.speaker: You

beats.narration: You grab your car keys and jacket, rushing for the door. The key turns with an exceptionally loud rattle in the lock.

The voice-activated light in the hallway flickers on, casting a deathly pale glow. You take the stairs two at a time, feeling as though the door closing behind you hasn't just shut, but has sealed away your last shred of dignity. Under the streetlights, your old car looks like a tin coffin.

You start the engine and drive forward without looking at the GPS. The city's neon lights shrink into blurry specks in the rearview mirror before being swallowed by the darkness. The roar of the engine is the only thing that can drown out the buzzing in your head right now. The fuel gauge needle slides all the way down, pointing to the red zone.

choices.label: Keep driving until you run out of gas
Find a place to pull over and have a smoke to calm down

beats.narration: As if trying to prove something, you slam your foot on the gas pedal. Finally, the engine gives an unwilling cough and dies. The car slowly glides to the roadside and stops. The surroundings are dead silent, save for the chirping of insects. You look up and see a dark, looming mountain in the distance, with a faint, warm yellow light flickering at the summit.

You pull over on a deserted roadside and light a cigarette. The smoke blurs the darkness outside the window. Halfway through the cigarette, you glance at the fuel gauge; the needle is practically resting on the red line. Irritated, you stub out the butt and restart the car. A few kilometers later, the engine completely gives out with a dying groan. You are stranded in the middle of nowhere. The only thing visible is that faint speck of light on the distant mountaintop.

You step out of the car, and the mountain wind hits you with a damp, earthy smell, making you shiver. You lock the car and start walking up the mountain toward that speck of light. The path is steep; you pant heavily, and the noise in your head is gradually replaced by the sound of the wind and your own heartbeat. Before you know it, you finally spot the source of the light—a solitary, old wooden cabin. Directly behind the cabin lies a darkness so thick it seems solid: the forest. A small window on the side of the cabin lets out some light, but what draws you most is a creaking, half-open wooden door at the back. The light spilling through its crack is entirely different—golden, warm, as if harboring another world inside.

choices.label: Knock on the cabin door first to see if anyone is inside
Push open the wooden door leading to the forest directly

effect.nextSceneSeed: Push open the creaking wooden door and step into an ancient forest bathed in golden sunlight, where a massive silhouette begins to materialize before you.

beats.narration: You hesitate for a moment and walk toward the small, lit window to check things out first. The glass is filthy; you struggle to wipe a small patch clean. The inside is empty and covered in dust, looking as though it hasn't been lived in for ages. Only a single kerosene lamp burns quietly on the table. Your gaze is drawn once again to the door at the back of the cabin. That golden light seems to possess a strange, beckoning power, making your heart itch with curiosity yet fill with a faint, underlying dread.

choices.label: Go around to the back of the cabin and push open the door

effect.nextSceneSeed: Push open the creaking wooden door and step into an ancient forest bathed in golden sunlight, where a massive silhouette begins to materialize before you.

choices.label: Forget it, go back to the car and wait until dawn

effect.nextSceneSeed: Return to your beat-up car and spend a long night in the darkness of the desolate mountains, only to find a line of words written in dew on the car door at dawn.

storyState.logline: Fleeing into the deep mountains to escape the despair of unemployment, you unexpectedly obtain a spirit's covenant: make one wish, at the cost of guarding this land for a hundred years. But you soon realize that the price of this pact is far heavier than you ever imagined—it connects to the final chapter of a forgotten, thousand-year war.
storyState.protagonist: You are a physically and mentally exhausted urban youth who has just been laid off. To escape reality, you flee to an old cabin deep in the mountains, only to accidentally trigger an ancient spirit covenant. What you long for is wealth and liberation, but right now, you are stuck at the pivotal moment of deciding whether to accept this high-priced gift, your heart filled with fear of the unknown and a trace of resentment at being struck by fate.
storyState.castNotes:
Lin Feng: The guardian spirit of the forest, appearing as a gentle and tall youth who promises to grant you one wish; however, deep in his eyes lies a thousand years of weariness and secrets, as if he is fulfilling an even older duty.
Su Xiao: The granddaughter of the cabin's former owner, a college student investigating her grandfather's disappearance; she is suspicious of your sudden appearance and contact with the covenant, yet has no choice but to cooperate with you because you might hold the key to the truth.
storyState.synopsis: Late at night, crushed by reality in your shared apartment after losing your job, you slam the door and flee into the desolate mountains in a beat-up used car. After running out of gas, you travel on foot and discover an old wooden cabin with a light on at the summit, along with a wooden door at the back that spills a strange golden light, leading to an ancient forest.
openThreads: Why did the spirit choose to make a covenant with me at this exact moment?
Did the former owner of the old cabin (Su Xiao's grandfather) go through the same thing?
Once my wish (to strike it rich) is granted, why will it trigger 'reverberations' that are far from pleasant?
storyState.nextHook: Next Scene: Push open the wooden door, step into the forest, meet the spirit Lin Feng, and face the choice of making your wish.

worldSetting:
This is an AI interactive story game targeted at a 【Male-oriented】 audience, featuring intense dramatic conflicts and rapid twists in the style of micro-drama short videos.
Story Style: Multi-line twists. Pace: Fast and exhilarating.
Opening setup for the featured story 'The Totoro Covenant': An unemployed corporate drone flees into an old house deep in the mountains, only to discover a giant spirit in the forest behind it. The spirit promises to grant him one wish, in exchange for becoming the forest's guardian for a hundred years. He originally wanted to wish for immense wealth, but instead gets dragged into the embers of a thousand-year war between the human world and the spirit realm.
Please dive straight into this opening to give the player a strong sense of immersion and instant gratification; subsequent branches should maintain the twist density of a micro-drama, allowing players to see immediate consequences for every choice they make.
styleGuide: Ghibli hand-painted style, vertical composition. An adventurous young boy hero with messy brown hair and bright, expressive eyes, standing next to a large friendly forest spirit in a lush, grassy woodland during golden hour. Soft watercolor washes, warm sunlight filtering through the trees.
